title: File uploads by Guest Users look like I uploaded them?
excerpt: When a Guest User submits a request through a Form and uploads files, they appear to be uploaded by Me (An admin user). My pic and name appears next to the file with a note that I uploaded / updated the file. But I didn’…

posts.author: Scott-Pigeon (Scott Sosebee)
posts.cookedHtml: When a Guest User submits a request through a Form and uploads files, they appear to be uploaded by Me (An admin user). My pic and name appears next to the file with a note that I uploaded / updated the file. But I didn’t. A guest user did. Is this a glitch, or os this how MONDAY.OM works since I invited the user?
